recipeBook.source: Linda and Grandma Rose, kitchen notebook
recipeBook.note: Copied from handwriting in the kitchen. The small variations Ryan keeps to himself are not written down.

recipe.name: Sunday tomato sauce
recipe.bestServed: Always better on the second day

ingredients.item: Good olive oil, never the cheap kind
Garlic, gentle, do not brown it
San Marzano tomatoes, crushed by hand
Sugar, only if the tomatoes are sharp
Fresh basil, added at the end

steps.step: Warm the oil and soften the garlic without color.
Add the crushed tomatoes and simmer low and slow.
Finish with basil off the heat.

ingredients.item: Breadcrumb with grated cheese mixed in

steps.step: Flour, egg, then breadcrumb each cutlet.
Sauce on top, fresh mozzarella, back in the oven only until it melts. Do not drown it.

ingredients.item: Mint, Grandma Rose insists, do not argue

steps.step: Mix rice, beef, sauce, and cheese, then fill the peppers.
Caps back on, bake covered, then uncovered to finish.

recipe.name: Antipasto for a crowd
recipe.occasion: The rehearsal dinner opener on October 15, 2026

steps.step: Arrange it like you mean it.
